Location_Master - subaward geography (HINT only; the award-action scope controls)
Prime-controlled states (final-assembly yard or major prime site):
CT/RI = Electric Boat (Groton/Quonset) ; VA = HII-Newport News ; MS = HII-Ingalls
Subaward $ landing in a prime-controlled state is distributed-view, not necessarily addressable.
